\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Class \mbox{\hyperlink{classMeshTools}{Mesh\+Tools}} Tools for the mesh. 

The get\+Face\+Triangulation method is imported from Open\+Flow\textquotesingle{}s Algo\+Visu\+Tools class. The is\+In\+Cell, is\+In\+Triangle and get\+Center methods are imported from the Open\+Flow\textquotesingle{}s Cell class. 

Definition at line 24 of file Mesh\+Tools.\+h.
